Motice Of Motion & Motion To Stay Actuant Corp'S Taking Of Depositions Of Pltff'S Treating Physicians & Quash Supoenas
Off Calendar Aug-17-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: RICHARD R. AMES, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY, ACTUANT CORPORATION

RULING:
TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Stay Defendant Actuant Corporation's Taking The Depositions of Plaintiff's Treating Physicians and To Quash The Subpoenas is denied. The court, by this order, authorizes the taking of the depositions after the trial date. The matter has been continued to August 22, 2005. There is no defect in Defendant's subpoenas. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (612/EAH) COURT REPORTER: ANRAE WIMBERLY, #7778
